name: cloud-delegation
description: Linear-as-queue + cloud-agent (Codex, Cursor) delegation workflow — issue creation, polling, push-back-vs-fix matrix, agent env constraints, AGENTS.md auto-sync hook. v1.6: retire don't-push hedge in favor of merge-train mode (`flow-review`) — workflow-only batch processor for 2+ open cloud-agent PRs that classifies by tier, dependency-sorts the queue, and runs the rebase cascade after each user-confirmed merge under the new mechanical-only rebase carve-out in delegation-rules.md. Also adds pre-flight conflict detection on N≥2 batch issue creation (touch-matrix on `## Files to modify` blocks → bundle / serializer / local / parallel recommendation), preventing cartouche-style fan-out where 4 of 9 issues touched the same registry file.
